productDisplayName: Lee Women Hanna Evergreen Green Top
description: Composition Green round neck Top made of cotton polyester blend, has short raglin sleeves and sequin and graphic print on the front Fit Regular Wash care only hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron, and do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery Revel in the fineries of art, music and film on weekends with this tee, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. The stylish sequin and print on the front makes this top a true piece of art. Team this with jeans or bermudas and chill out in style. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
